desc: 使用自制引擎开发的二次元角色扮演游戏，AI辅助的技术与游戏世界观设计。
descEn: An anime-style RPG built with a custom engine, with AI-assisted technology and world-building design.

desc: 使用AI Models生成的艺术品，并用Midjourney、Comfyui、FLUX、SD等工具制作。
descEn: Artworks generated with AI models, created using tools such as Midjourney, ComfyUI, FLUX, and Stable Diffusion.

desc: 这是一本关于我个人对建筑指南的理解，记录了建筑设计的创作过程。
descEn: A personal guide to architecture, documenting my understanding of architectural design and its creative process.

desc: 使用Godot游戏引擎制作的小游戏演示，包含2D像素风格的平台跳跃游戏。
descEn: A small game demo made with the Godot engine, featuring a 2D pixel-art platformer.

desc: 浏览器单机星际贸易经营游戏：Babylon.js 3D 星图、动态经济与贸易循环，涵盖舰队、金融、派系与本地存档。
descEn: A browser-based single-player interstellar trading sim with a Babylon.js 3D star map, dynamic economy and trade loop, plus fleet, finance, factions, and local saves.

desc: 横屏街机风格宠物养成放置游戏：命运桌资源循环、可操控的宠物远征探索战斗，以及领地建筑承接中期成长。
descEn: A landscape arcade-style pet idle game: fate-table resource loops, controllable pet expeditions for exploration and combat, and territory buildings for mid-game progression.

desc: Godot 2D 俯视角模拟经营：唐末小镇建设与资源管理，兼顾家族治理、农商军备与外交辞令应对。
descEn: A Godot 2D top-down town sim set in late Tang China: manage resources and construction while balancing clan rule, farming, trade, military escorts, and diplomatic encounters.

desc: RTS+SLG玩法模型，经典卧龙吟IP二代新作
descEn: An RTS + SLG gameplay model; the second installment of the classic Wolong Yin IP.

desc: RPG+SLG玩法模型，商业化抽卡游戏，经典三国IP
descEn: An RPG + SLG gameplay model; a commercial gacha game based on the classic Three Kingdoms IP.

desc: NotionNext博客是一个基于Notion的博客系统，使用Next.js作为前端框架，Vercel作为部署平台。
descEn: A Notion-based blogging system built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel.

desc: 一个集成了策划本地化、跨项目翻译对应、JSON检测、Excel处理、翻译提取、批量改表等功能的多功能游戏开发工具集。
descEn: A multi-purpose game development toolkit covering localization, cross-project translation mapping, JSON validation, Excel processing, translation extraction, and batch table editing.

desc: 将一些通过AI创作的壁纸和摄影作品上传到Unsplash，免费与大家分享。
descEn: AI-created wallpapers and photography uploaded to Unsplash, shared with everyone for free.
